assumption_text: The episode is restricted to the immediate direct blast footprint on block 2 of Calle Tarata.
rationale: The source describes a compact street-level urban attack rather than a wider battlefield.

assumption_text: The five disappeared are excluded from direct-death and direct-casualty totals unless later confirmation is provided by the same source family.
rationale: Project rules prohibit silently converting disappearance into death.

assumption_text: The fallback denominator is known direct casualties rather than all persons exposed to the blast.
rationale: No stable count of everyone within the lethal and injury footprint was recovered.
